title: Monday.Com For Creative Professionals
excerpt: We use Monday.com for video and photography production. I am curious, what are some of your best tips for creative usage?

posts.author: MelissaFox (Melissa Fox )
posts.cookedHtml: We use Monday.com for video and photography production. I am curious, what are some of your best tips for creative usage?

posts.author: Matt-monday.com (Matt Burns)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Melissa, great question! When it comes to creative projects I always find the simplest solutions tend to work best for me. Using a board to track the entire process broken up into the major phases of a creative project is my favorite thing. I use the Video Pre Production template often and modify it for my specific use case.

image2138×1162 270 KB

You can use this easily inside your monday.com account and edit it to suit your workflow. Then you and your team can easily communicate on each status where the project is at and what if anything might be causing a project slowdown. Great topic!
